findings.blocker: grassmannian_separated itself has no own sorry (reduced via terminal.from), but rests on grassmannianScheme_isSeparated which carries 1 isolated geometric sorry (diagonal closed-immersion assembly). Blocked by (a) Mathlib has no Scheme.GlueData -> IsSeparated; cover criterion isClosedImmersion_diagonal_restrict_diagonalCoverDiagonalRange only handles diagonal blocks U^I x U^I, not off-diagonal I != J; (b) the ZZ tensor module diamond prevents naming the chart-product ring ZZ[X^I] tensor_ZZ ZZ[X^J].

next_steps: Do NOT re-dispatch the same blind route.
